_comment: Zoom Web DOM selectors used by the host automation userscript. Zoom may update its DOM structure at any time. When selectors stop working, update the values here — no changes to the main script are needed.
_instructions: Each key maps to a CSS selector string. The script will attempt the primary selector first; if it finds no matching element it falls back to the 'fallback' value. Set 'fallback' to null when no alternative is known.

participantList._note: Container element that holds all participant rows.

participantRow._note: Repeating row element for a single participant inside the participant list.

participantName._note: Text element inside a participant row that displays the participant's display name.

raisedHandIcon._note: Icon or element that appears inside a participant row when that participant has raised their hand.

participantMenuButton._note: Button inside a participant row that opens the context menu for that participant.

multipinMenuOption._note: Menu item inside the participant context menu that grants Multi-Pin permission. When the fallback is used, the script MUST additionally validate the element's text content contains 'Multi-Pin' because the fallback selector matches all menu items.

chatSender._note: Element inside a chat message row that displays the sender's display name.

cameraStatusIcon._note: Icon indicating a participant's camera is currently off.

chatContainer._note: Scrollable container that holds the meeting chat message history.

chatMessage._note: Element inside the chat container that contains the text of a single message.

chatInput._note: Text input field in the chat panel where the host types a message.
